title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries
description: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Learners cumulatively produce an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
